creator: microsoft.com

evidence.text: To continually improve Ava, Commerzbank AG is now evolving the agent, using Foundry Agent Service , so that a network of specialized agents will manage distinct tasks across the bank’s operations. This agentic architecture, with agents running on Azure Container Apps, provides a trusted, scalable foundation for building and evolving agentic AI.
